pi_items.source: Task instructions, setup_task.sh spec generation, export_result.sh read logic, and verifier.py all enforce and use this exact file path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a synthetic scenario requiring the agent to build an OpenVSP UAV model from scratch based on a dynamically generated specification file. It is confirmed that the expected output file path exactly matches '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/twin_boom_uav.vsp3', as this path is explicitly targeted by the evaluation scripts.
